# CodeDecay Wiki

This wiki is a lightweight index for the main CodeDecay documentation site.

Use the docs site for full navigation, search, and deploy-ready static pages. Use the raw endpoints when you want direct retrieval for agents and automation.

## Primary Docs

- [Docs Home](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/)
- [Getting Started](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/getting-started)
- [GitHub Action](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/github-action)
- [Configuration](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/configuration)
- [Sample Reports](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/sample-reports/)

## Agent-Friendly Endpoints

- [llms.txt](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/llms.txt)
- [llms-full.txt](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/llms-full.txt)
- [Docs Home Markdown](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/markdown/index.md)
- [Getting Started Markdown](https://submuxhq.github.io/CodeDecay/markdown/getting-started.md)
